<!-- Tip: Use /create-skill in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Define the functionality provided by this skill, including detailed instructions and examples
- write test cases for a given function or feature
- provide examples of input and expected output
- ensure edge cases and error handling are covered
- 100% code coverage
